description: the transcript-inspector snapshot (#101): recent ephemeral transcript chunks + the current stt slot config. Per-chunk stt endpoint/model is NOT recorded (#65 gap); sttSlot is the current configuration, not a per-chunk claim.

chunks.description: recent transcript updates, newest-first, from the in-memory ring — NOT persisted

source.description: mic = the user; system-audio = the far side of a call (loopback) — the free me/them split; focus = foreground-window context (P3 context-switch detection), utf8 JSON FocusSignal, never a transcript

text.description: raw transcribed text for this drain window — a live feed, never persisted

capturedAtRange.description: the capturedAt span of the chunks aggregated into this update

sttSlot.description: the CURRENT stt slot endpoints (endpoint · model). NOT per-chunk provenance — per-chunk stt provenance is the disclosed #65 gap

endpoint.description: the stt endpoint name (never a secret)

model.description: the model the endpoint serves, when it names one

ringLimit.description: how many recent updates the ephemeral ring retains for this process (retention disclosure)
